message:
feat(messaging): add federation restart envelope, fabric shared-shard packing, session obligation derivation, and fix contract path validation

Messaging fabric:
- Add SharedShardPackingStrategy (StableHashBucket) and SharedShardEligibility
  types for deterministic low-rate cell packing onto shared control shards
- Add associated builder helpers and configuration types

Messaging federation:
- Add DistributedRestartEnvelope with configurable restart budgets, rolling
  windows, and backoff strategies (Fixed, Exponential, Jitter)
- Add RestartBudgetExceeded error and restart-budget tracking types
- Add full test coverage for restart budget enforcement

Session obligation:
- Replace DerivedObligationPlaceholder stub with full mechanical obligation
  derivation engine for session-typed protocol contracts
- Implements DerivedObligation, ObligationCoverage, SessionObligationDeriver
  with path-walking obligation extraction from ProtocolContract

Session contract:
- Fix path validation to use is_addressable_session_path() instead of direct
  HashSet::contains(), preventing false positives on root/empty paths
- Add 3 regression tests: root timeout, root compensation trigger, root cutoff
  step rejection

Messaging stream:
- Add tests for retention pruning by byte budget and message count limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
